page_metadata.biotools__summary: A pipeline for particle detection in cryo-electron microscopy images using convolutional neural networks trained from positive and unlabeled examples. Topaz also includes methods for micrograph denoising using deep denoising models.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A pipeline for particle detection in cryo-electron microscopy images using convolutional neural networks trained from positive and unlabeled examples. Topaz also includes methods for micrograph denoising using deep denoising models.
